text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
……? Feels as though someone was 
calling out to me but, was I just 
imagining it?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Well…… Doesn't matter too much. This 
sort of stuff happens pretty often on my 
travels, like when you're in a dark forest, 
deep in a cave, or floating through ruins…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: I didn't think the academy would have something that could incite this feeli—— Hm…?
